'''''Majestic''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] that served as [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] private [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] in the months following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==History==
At some point after the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], it was built over [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] at [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].

A couple of months before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]] managed to intercept and damage this vessel with the Emperor aboard in an attempted coup of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

Had it not been for the timely arrival of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and then-[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Vanguard (Imperial-class)|''Vanguard'']], it is quite likely both the Emperor and ''Majestic'' would have fallen into Zaarin's hands.

{{Ship-stub}}
